layouts.name: Overview Galaxy
layouts.description: High-level starter view with four wing galaxies and local subclusters for modules, public topics, and sandbox zones.

layouts.name: Curriculum Flow
layouts.description: Sequence-first layout for planning and progress tracking, ordered by sequence number with wing bands and type depth.

layouts.name: Wing Clusters
layouts.description: Compact navigation view grouping nodes primarily by wing, with lighter secondary clustering inside each wing.

layouts.name: Sandbox Practice Map
layouts.description: Wing 4-centered layout that pins Chaos Zones as anchors and places other wings as supporting constellations around the sandbox.
